products.title: SmartRoute Revenue OS
products.tagline: Conversion + LTV Optimization for iGaming Operators
products.description: Operators leave significant revenue on the table from existing traffic — sub-optimal conversion paths, weak LTV programs, mismatched bonus targeting. SmartRoute Revenue OS optimizes the journey end-to-end: AI tunes conversion funnels, segments players for LTV, and rebalances bonus offers in real time.
products.subject_line: Your existing traffic is leaving money on the table.
products.why_works: More revenue from the same traffic. The cleanest argument an operator CMO ever has to buy.

products.title: BrokenBonus Detector
products.tagline: Revenue Leak Hunter for iGaming Marketing Surfaces
products.description: Operators run hundreds of bonus pages, affiliate links, and geo-targeted offers. Broken redirects, expired offers, and misconfigured GEO targeting silently bleed conversions every day. BrokenBonus Detector continuously crawls every marketing surface, surfaces leaks, and quantifies the lost revenue.
products.subject_line: 47 of your bonus pages are broken. Here's what they cost you.
before_bullets: Manual audit too painful to run
products.why_works: Quantified revenue leaks are uncomfortable to read and impossible to ignore. Same crawler, multiple products.

products.title: Marketing Automation System
products.description: Most operators run marketing as disjointed pieces — separate tools for lead gen, conversion, delivery, retention, with manual handoffs and lost context. The Marketing Automation System unifies the pipeline: AI orchestrates lead generation, conversion sequences, fulfillment, and retention loops in one structured system.
products.subject_line: Your funnel is held together by humans. Let's fix that.
products.why_works: Each idea targets a different part of the funnel — but together they create a more efficient, scalable, data-driven operation.
